A

Account - AccountType中的类
The type Account used to saving money and transaction.
Account() - 类的构造器 AccountType.Account
 
AccountBillInfo - AccountType中的类
use to kill an object and remove it from the filesystem
AccountBillInfo() - 类的构造器 AccountType.AccountBillInfo
 
AccountInfoReader - login中的类
The AccountInfoReader class implements the LoginCheck interface and is responsible for reading and managing account information from a structured file system.
AccountInfoReader() - 类的构造器 login.AccountInfoReader
 
AccountInfoWriter - login中的类
The AccountInfoWriter class is responsible for writing and updating user data in the system.
AccountInfoWriter() - 类的构造器 login.AccountInfoWriter
 
accountListLoader(String) - 类中的方法 login.AccountInfoReader
Loads a list of Account objects associated with the given email.
accountLoader(String, String) - 类中的方法 login.AccountInfoReader
Account loader account.
AccountLog - AccountType中的类
The type Account log use to generate Log and safe to specific file
AccountLog() - 类的构造器 AccountType.AccountLog
 
AccountModifier - AccountType中的类
The type Account modifier.
AccountModifier() - 类的构造器 AccountType.AccountModifier
 
AccountType - 程序包 AccountType
 
AccountVisualizationFrame - AccountType中的类
A JFrame subclass that visualizes account data over a series of years.
AccountVisualizationFrame(String, String) - 类的构造器 AccountType.AccountVisualizationFrame
Constructs a new frame to display financial data for a specified account.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.CreateGoalHandler
Handles the action performed event when the user attempts to create a new goal.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.createTaskHandler
Responds to action events by opening the Create Task Page.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.deliverTaskHandler
Responds to action events by opening the Deliver Task Page.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.DetailHandler
 
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.GetTaskHandler
Responds to action events by disposing the current page and opening the Get Task Page.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.GoalHandler
 
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.KidHomeHandler
Responds to action events by loading kid-specific data, transitioning to the kid's homepage, and disposing of the current page.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.KidProfileHandler
Responds to action events by disposing the current page and opening a new Profile Page tailored for kids.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.NotificationHandler
Responds to action events by disposing of the homepage and current page, and opening a new NotificationPage.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.ParentHomeHandler
Responds to action events by loading parent-specific data, transitioning to the parent's homepage, and disposing of the current page.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.ParentProfileHandler
Invoked when an action event is detected.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 Handler.SetTaskHandler
Invoked when an action event is detected.
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 login.CreateAccountHandler
 
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 login.LoginHandler
 
actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - 类中的方法 login.SignUpHandler
 
addBalance(String, double) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountModifier
Add balance and modified file content.
addBalance(String, double, Account) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountModifier
Add balance and modified file content.
addKidTest - login中的类
The type Add kid test.
addKidTest() - 类的构造器 login.addKidTest
 
addTask(String, String) - 类中的方法 User.User
Adds a new task to the user's task list and creates a corresponding task file.
appendTextToFile(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountLog
Append text to file to the third line of the file.
appendTextToFile(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.exampleCreator
Appends text to a specific position in a file or creates new content if the file is too short.
authenticate(String, String) - 类中的方法 login.AccountInfoReader
 
authenticate(String, String) - 接口中的方法 login.LoginCheck
